name: YC Inox Co.,Ltd
summary: YC Inox Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells stainless steel products in Taiwan. It offers stainless steel coils, sheets, plates, pipes, tubes, angles, flat bars, and U channel products. The company was formerly known as Yeun Chyang Industrial Co., Ltd. and changed its name to YC Inox Co., Ltd. in July 2012. YC Inox Co., Ltd. was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Changhua City, Taiwan.
